data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

For 7 days from 12/6 (Tue), rewards dropped in Scrimmages will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this opportunity to upgrade your Exclusive Weapons!

🗓️Period: 12/6 (Tue) 2:00 – 12/12 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)![Fwagv4qmlsJgsiy2yvjeRDRgvsO8NTDP.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/Fwagv4qmlsJgsiy2yvjeRDRgvsO8NTDP.jpg)
